name: Sendy
summary: Print Sendy shipping labels straight from ShopLinkr. One workflow for all your parcels.
tagline: Smart software for a simple shipping process.
about: Sendy is shipping software that helps businesses send parcels efficiently. It offers integrations with carriers such as PostNL, DHL and DPD, and connects easily with webshops. With Sendy you can create shipping labels automatically, streamline your shipping process and benefit from competitive rates.

faqs.q: Are address details added to the shipping label automatically?
faqs.a: Yes, based on an order's shipping details we request a shipping label from Sendy. You can adjust the address details manually if you want.
